info.title: Vision Studio API
info.description: Local-first AI image and video generation backend for the Vision Studio Electron desktop app. The runtime backend exposes a richer, fully introspectable spec at http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/openapi.json — this file is a hand-curated, human-friendly snapshot suitable for diffing in PRs.

post.summary: Enhance a prompt
Start an image generation job (async)
Start a video generation job (async)
Cancel a pending or running job

get.summary: Truthful hardware probe: GPU, VRAM, compute capability, RAM, disk (spec 6.1). Never errors — a failed CUDA query degrades to gpu_available=false with zeroed VRAM fields (a half-probed GPU must never look usable)
List available models (full Foundry registry records)
Search Hugging Face or CivitAI; offline-degrading (upstream failures return 200 with offline=true, never a 5xx)

parameters.name: task
parameters.description: HF pipeline tag filter (hf source only)

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Unknown values fall back to downloads (hf source only)

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page of 20 results, 1-50 (hf source only; echoed back for both sources). Bounded: the HF call requests page*20 items, so the cap stops request amplification.

parameters.name: nsfw
parameters.description: Include NSFW results (civitai source only; NSFW-off by default)

parameters.name: X-HF-Token
parameters.description: Optional Hugging Face token (hf source). Read per-request; never persisted, never logged.

parameters.name: X-Civitai-Token
parameters.description: Optional CivitAI token (civitai source). Read per-request; never persisted, never logged.

200.description: Search results; on upstream failure offline=true with a warning naming only the exception type. HF results that would classify compatible from listing tags alone are re-verified against full repo signals first; verification failure fails closed to experimental.

422.description: Out-of-bounds query parameters (page outside 1-50, over-length q/author/task)

post.summary: Grant or revoke per-model security consent (deny-by-default, audited)

200.description: Full post-update consent state for the model

get.summary: Snapshot of every download job (queue + progress)

post.summary: Enqueue a model download (consent-gated; transient HF records are reclassified from full repo signals before the consent checks; CivitAI-source records are sha256-verified, refused when hashless, and redirects are walked manually with https-only hops and first-party-only auth; HF repo file lists exclude .py always and pickle suffixes without consent)

parameters.name: X-HF-Token
parameters.description: Optional Hugging Face token, read for non-civitai-source records. Never persisted, never logged.

parameters.name: X-Civitai-Token
parameters.description: Optional CivitAI token, read for civitai-source records. Never persisted, never logged.

409.description: Consent missing — detail.error_code is pickle-consent-required or remote-code-consent-required; grant via POST /api/models/consent and retry

503.description: detail.error_code repo-signals-unverifiable — a transient HF record's full safety signals could not be fetched; the download fails closed before any bytes move. Retry when online.

post.summary: Pause, resume, or cancel an in-flight download

parameters.name: X-HF-Token
parameters.description: Re-read on resume for non-civitai-source records

parameters.name: X-Civitai-Token
parameters.description: Re-read on resume for civitai-source records

post.summary: Consent-gated pickle -> safetensors conversion inside the torch.load(weights_only=True) security boundary

409.description: Conflict — detail.error_code is pickle-consent-required, no-pickle-source, or already-converted (an existing safetensors file is never silently clobbered)

422.description: Conversion failed (corrupt or unreadable pickle source)

503.description: Conversion unavailable — backend is running in stub mode without torch installed

post.summary: Resolve the load plan for THIS machine (spec 6.4): fresh hardware probe + record + per-model consent -> concrete diffusers plan. Refusals are informational 200 payloads (refusal field set, plan fields at null defaults) — 'this will not load, and here is why' is an answer, not a server error

200.description: Runtime plan; refusals (remote-code records, unconverted pickle, unsupported architecture/capability, single-file family without a from_single_file path) arrive here as payloads, never as 4xx/5xx

post.summary: Register a user library root by reference (never copies bytes)
Re-index every feed (app tree, HF cache, linked roots)

get.summary: First-run detection: existing ComfyUI / A1111 installs (offers only, nothing registered)

delete.summary: Remove a library root; drops linked records, never touches source bytes

get.summary: Get a single Foundry registry record by id (resolving legacy aliases)

409.description: Model is a linked library reference — remove its library root instead

post.summary: Crop / rotate / flip an image
Upscale an image
Extract a still frame from a video
Export a resolved timeline frame stream to MP4 (async)
Generate image with ControlNet conditioning
Unload the ControlNet model from VRAM
Generate image with a LoRA mixer
Unload the LoRA from VRAM
Remove the background of an image
Real-ESRGAN super-resolution
GFPGAN face restoration

get.summary: List edit-tool models and load state

post.summary: Export multiple images as a ZIP archive

BackendToken.name: x-vision-studio-token
BackendToken.description: Per-launch token minted by the Electron Main process. Required when VISION_STUDIO_BACKEND_AUTH_TOKEN is set on the backend (always set in production builds).

ModelRecord.description: Full Foundry registry record returned by GET /api/models and GET /api/models/{model_id} (M3+).

status.description: ready | downloading | error | not_found | queued | verifying | paused | cancelled

locations.description: Absolute filesystem paths where the artifact is present (M3+)

library_root_id.description: ID of the LibraryRoot this record was indexed from, if any (M3+)

tier_reason.description: Human-readable explanation of the classifier's tier verdict (M4+)

trust_remote_code.description: Model requires executing repo-authored code; download is consent-gated (M4+)

download_url.description: Direct acquisition URL for CivitAI-source records. Server-side only — never included in SearchResult responses (M4+)

sha256.description: Expected weight digest; must be a 64-character lowercase hex string (schema-validated). Server-side only — never included in SearchResult responses (M4+)

companions.description: Catalog ids of companion artifacts (e.g. a recommended VAE) in the dependency graph (M5+)

measured_vram_bytes.description: Calibrated peak VRAM measurement from the calibration harness; basis for 'measured' fit verdicts (M5+)

path.description: Absolute filesystem path to the model library directory

layout_hint.description: Hint for directory-layout interpretation: generic | comfyui | a1111 | diffusers | huggingface

records_indexed.description: Total ModelRecords indexed across all feeds

DownloadJob.description: Download-queue entry returned by the download routes and GET /api/models/downloads.

gate_url.description: Set when an HF repo is gated and terms must be accepted on the hub first

SearchResult.description: One hub search hit (M4+). Never carries download_url or sha256 — those stay server-side on the registry record.

tier_reason.description: Human-readable explanation of the tier verdict

SearchResponse.description: Hub search envelope (M4+). Offline-degrade contract: upstream failures return 200 with offline=true and a warning naming only the exception type — never a 5xx.

ConsentRequest.description: Grant/revoke per-model security consent (M4+). Deny-by-default, per-model, audited.

ConsentState.description: Full per-model consent state after an update (M4+).

ConvertResult.description: Result of a pickle -> safetensors conversion (M4+).

safetensors_path.description: Absolute path of the written .safetensors file (next to the pickle source)

HardwareProfile.description: Truthful hardware probe result (M5, spec 6.1). gpu_available is true ONLY when every CUDA query succeeded; probe failures degrade the affected fields to zero/null rather than erroring.

compute_major.description: CUDA compute capability major version (8.0+ = bf16, 8.9+ = fp8)

disk_free_bytes.description: Free bytes on the volume holding the models directory

VramEstimate.description: VRAM budget breakdown inside a RuntimePlan (M5, spec 6.2).

weight_bytes.description: Weights at the planned precision (exact from local safetensors headers when available; else parsed from the record's size string)

basis.description: measured = calibrated measured_vram_bytes on the record; estimated = computed bands

RuntimePlan.description: The load plan for this machine (M5, spec 6.4). A refusal is an informational 200 payload — refusal is set (mirrored in readiness) and the plan fields stay at their null defaults; preflight never signals refusals as 4xx/5xx.

precision.description: bf16 | fp16 | fp32 (fp16-corrupting families like flux/sd35 get fp32 on pre-bf16 GPUs)

config_catalog_id.description: Catalog id whose repo supplies from_single_file's pinned config (single-file plans only)

missing_components.description: Weighted model_index.json submodels with no weights on disk; config-only components never appear

fallback_ladder.description: Ordered OOM-recovery rungs (spec 6.6), e.g. precision:fp16, offload:cpu, vae:tiling, attention:slicing-max

readiness.description: Human-readable preflight readout for the Generate panel footer

refusal.description: Set when the model will not load on any hardware (remote code, unconverted pickle, unsupported architecture, no single-file path). Informational — still HTTP 200

image.description: Server-relative URL for the derived image

output_path.description: Absolute filesystem path on the backend host
